assertions.title: Search + filter + selection emits correct script

steps.action: Create dir with alpha and beta entries. Run --and-type=bet --and-keys='ENTER'
steps.expected: stdout cd script for beta, not alpha
steps.observed: stdout: touch + echo + cd for .../2025-02-20-beta. Exit code 0.

assertions.title: Search + no match + create new emits mkdir

steps.observed: stdout: mkdir -p + touch + echo + cd for .../2026-04-13-myproject. Exit code 0.

assertions.title: Error handling: permission denied skips gracefully

steps.action: Create dir with readable and chmod-000 unreadable subdirs. Run --and-exit
steps.observed: Only 2025-01-01-readable entry visible. Unreadable dir silently skipped. Exit code 1 (--and-exit).

assertions.title: NO_COLOR disables styling across all elements

steps.observed: 0 SGR sequences found. Only cursor control sequences (ESC[H, ESC[J) present.
Multiple SGR sequences found (colors, bold, dim)

steps.action: Run --and-type=bet --and-exit. Check ANSI codes around matched chars in 'beta' entry
steps.expected: Bold yellow codes (1;33m or similar) on matched characters
steps.observed: Matched chars 'bet' in 'beta' rendered with ANSI code 1;33;48;5;238m (bold + yellow + selection bg). Non-matched 'a' uses normal style.

steps.action: Verify layout adapts to different LAB_WIDTH values (proxy for resize)
steps.expected: Different widths produce different separator lengths
steps.observed: LAB_WIDTH=40: 80 separator chars (2 lines × 40). LAB_WIDTH=80: 160 separator chars (2 lines × 80). Layout adapts to dimensions.

steps.action: Tuistory interactive test: launch binary, resize tmux pane
steps.observed: Separator lines changed from 80-wide to 120-wide after resize, path display expanded, footer adapted. Shrink to 40x12 also properly redrawn.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. Cross-area flows (search+select, create-new, empty dir), error handling (permission denied), NO_COLOR support, fuzzy highlight styling, and SIGWINCH resize all work correctly.
